description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and an open, L-shaped layout. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front includes a double garage with a driveway, and the property is landscaped with trees and shrubs in the yard and garden areas. The house is divided into multiple rooms, including what appears to be a central living area, bedrooms, and utility spaces, all arranged around a central courtyard or patio. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with a mix of glass, concrete, and wood accents. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless transition between the house and its surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open L-shaped layout featuring a double garage and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entry, and a glimpse of the central courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and a landscaped backyard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, the central courtyard, and the open layout of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, garden, and the arrangement of rooms around the courtyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a double garage, short steps, and a minimalist door set back from the driveway, no porch or columns.
